title: VBU Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 26 Professor, Assistant Librarian Posts
description: The Visva Bharati University (VBU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 26 Professor, Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Librarian Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation and  Ph.D. can apply for the VBU Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the educ...
